scope.compiler_pipeline: fixture provider, strict IR parsing, validation, private storage, and cache reuse
scope.provider: deterministic test fixture; no network or model inference
scope.dry_run: synthetic qualification callback only; verifyd/Chromium dry-run latency is not measured

not_measured.manual_authoring_time_and_quality: requires representative human authoring records; no historic record is fabricated
not_measured.warm_browser_dry_run_latency: requires the real verifyd/Chromium qualification path, not this callback fixture
not_measured.accepted_candidate_quality: no candidate is accepted by this private-staging benchmark
not_measured.local_free_provider: requires an explicitly installed local model and recorded model identity
not_measured.paid_provider: requires explicit paid approval and must never be invoked by a default benchmark
